title: Shanti Mantra
intro: Read the Shanti Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive peace of mind.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Shantih Shantih Shantih.

English Meaning

Om,
May there be
peace everywhere.
May there be
peace in
mind,
speech,
and actions.
May the entire universe
be filled with peace.

faq.q1: When should Shanti Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Shanti Mantra is commonly chanted at the end of prayers, yajnas, meditation, or other religious rituals.
faq.q2: How many times should Shanti Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 3, 11, 21, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Shanti Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Shanti Mantra is believed to bring inner peace, harmony, positive energy, and spiritual balance.
faq.q4: Can Shanti Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Shanti Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Shanti Mantra with faith and devotion.
